mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_t
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND active = 1
AND active = 0

SELECT b.*, COALESCE(r.report_count, 0) AS report_count FROM board_t b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_idx, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM board_report_t WHERE target_type = 'POST' GROUP BY target_idx ) r ON b.b_idx = r.target_idx
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.active = 1
AND b.active = 0
ORDER BY b.b_idx DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT b.*, COALESCE(r.report_count, 0) AS report_count FROM board_t b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_idx, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM board_report_t WHERE target_type = 'POST' GROUP BY target_idx ) r ON b.b_idx = r.target_idx WHERE b.b_idx = #{bIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_t SET active = 1 WHERE b_idx = #{bIdx}
UPDATE board_t SET active = 0 WHERE b_idx = #{bIdx}
UPDATE board_report_t SET status = #{status} WHERE r_idx = #{rIdx}
UPDATE board_t b JOIN board_report_t r ON r.target_idx = b.b_idx AND r.target_type = 'POST' SET b.active = 1, r.status = 'PROCESSED' WHERE r.r_idx = #{rIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT target_author AS author, COUNT(*) AS report_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PROCESSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processed_count, MIN(reg_date) AS first_report, MAX(reg_date) AS last_report FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'POST' THEN b.author ELSE c.author END AS target_author, r.status, r.reg_date FROM board_report_t r LEFT JOIN board_t b ON r.target_type = 'POST' AND b.b_idx = r.target_idx LEFT JOIN comment_t c ON r.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND c.c_idx = r.target_idx ) sub WHERE target_author IS NOT NULL GROUP BY target_author ORDER BY report_count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_report_t WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_t WHERE active = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_t WHERE active = 1
